GreenRoaches.name: Green Roaches (Enhancing)
GreenRoaches.desc:
Each Round Start, grant the Emperor buffs based on stack count:
1 Poise Potency (1 turn) per 10 stacks; 1 Haste per 25 stacks; 1 Protection per 40 stacks; 1 Defense Level Up per 30 stacks; 1 Attack Level Up per 30 stacks; 1 Binding Vow per 60 stacks. (Max 120)

EnragedGreenRoaches.name: Green Roaches (Enraged)
EnragedGreenRoaches.desc:
Each Round Start, afflict the bearer:
1 Burn (1 turn) per 12 stacks; 1 Bleed (1 turn) per 12 stacks; 1 Bind per 15 stacks; 1 Clash Power Down per 20 stacks; 1 Plus Coin Power Down per 30 stacks.
Lose 40% of stacks at Round End. (Max 120)
EnragedGreenRoaches.flavor: These Roaches are starved and hungry for food.

SukunaPlotArmor.name: Binding Vow (Green Emperor)
SukunaPlotArmor.desc: Gain 1 Restriction per 2 Binding Vows; at maximum Binding Vows (6), gain 1 Final Power and 1 Clash Power. (Max 6)

Restriction.name: Restriction
Restriction.desc: Gain 1 Defense Level Down for every 2 Restriction; gain 1 Fragile for every 6 Restriction (Max 30)
